# encapsulate()

**Instance Method**

Generates and encapsulates a shared secret.

## Declaration

```swift
func encapsulate() throws -> KEM.EncapsulationResult
```

## Return Value

An encapsulated shared secret, that you decapsulate by calling [doc://com.apple.CryptoKit/documentation/CryptoKit/MLKEM768/PrivateKey/decapsulate(_:)] on the corresponding private key.
title: encapsulate()
